title: Maps & Boss Keys
subtitle: Endgame content unlocked after completing all 5 acts. {{tiers}} map tiers and {{bosses}} unique boss encounters.
unlockDesc: Maps unlock after completing all main-chain locations (orders 1-8) in all 5 acts. Upon unlocking, you receive 3 Tier 1 Map Keys to get started.
tiersNote: Map monsters use Act 5 stats as a baseline, scaled by the tier multipliers above. Higher tiers feature tougher monsters but greatly increased rewards.
keySelectionDesc: The quality of boss keys you find depends on the map tier you're running. Lower tiers drop Standard keys, mid tiers drop Empowered, and the highest tiers drop Mythic keys. Boss maps always award the best quality keys.
sameTierDetail: Map key of the same tier you just completed
tierUpDetail: Map key one tier higher (if not at max)
bonusDetail: One tier above the guaranteed drop
